display.purpose: Hero screens and net-profit card. Once per page.

body.purpose: Data rows, descriptions, paragraph text (75ch max).

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button. Deep Verdigris background, white label text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #0D3A35; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: 'Noto Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; padding: 16px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #062320; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0D3A35; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #041a17; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent with Deep Verdigris text.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #0D3A35; font-family: 'Noto Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; padding: 16px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { text-decoration: underline; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0D3A35; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { background: #B71C1C; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: 'Noto Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; padding: 16px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: #8b1515; } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #B71C1C; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Content container. White on Warm Paper, 12px radius, no shadow.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; border: 1px solid #B1B7AB; font-family: 'Noto Sans', sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #1B1C1C; margin: 0 0 4px; } .ds-card-body { font-size: 14px; color: #0D3A35; font-weight: 700; margin: 0; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text input. 1px outline, white background, 8px radius.
components.css: .ds-input-label { display: block; font-family: 'Noto Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #5A6657; margin-bottom: 4px; letter-spacing: 0.01em; } .ds-input { width: 100%; font-family: 'Noto Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #1B1C1C; background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #B1B7AB; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 16px; box-sizing: border-box; outline: none; transition: border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #0D3A35; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #5A6657; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Filter chip — unselected state. Light tint bg, Deep Verdigris text.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #E2EBEA; color: #0D3A35; font-family: 'Noto Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; padding: 6px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-chip:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0D3A35; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Filter Chip (Selected)
components.description: Filter chip — selected state. Deep Verdigris bg, white text.

narrative.overview: PocketPlus is a quietly premium bookkeeping tool for Indian small business owners. The ledger is the central metaphor — every screen is a page in a master book: calm, exact, never decorative. The interface earns trust through precision and restraint, not ornament. This system rejects the cluttered energy of consumer payments apps and the cold density of legacy accounting software. It feels more like a well-bound notebook than a dashboard — spacious, considered, and authoritative. Money is shown as fact, not decoration.
keyCharacteristics: Refined and restrained — components use gentle 12px corners, minimal borders, and forgiving whitespace
Tonal depth is carried by surface shifts, not drop shadows — cards sit on a warm off-white field, not floating
Money is precise and never decorated — income in Deep Verdigris, expense in red, always paise-accurate
Typography distinguishes display (Plus Jakarta Sans, for headings) from body (Noto Sans, for Indic-script safety)
The palette is restrained — one dark accent (Deep Verdigris) carries the brand; surfaces stay near-white and near-black

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Deep Verdigris is the sole primary accent. Secondary is identical to primary by design — there is no second brand color. Variety comes from neutral surface shifts, not from introducing competing hues.

rules.name: The Noto Sans Rule
rules.body: Every text widget that could render Devanagari script (Hindi, Marathi) must use Noto Sans. Plus Jakarta Sans is display-only and never used for body copy or labels.

dos: use exact paise values for money — never rounded rupees or doubles
pair income with a + sign and expense with a − sign so meaning is not color-dependent
keep the primary accent to ≤10% of any screen
use Deep Verdigris Dark for button hover states to give tactile feedback
use tonal layering (card white on surface warm paper) rather than shadows
use Noto Sans for any text that may render Devanagari
keep the net-profit figure as the most prominent number on any dashboard screen
donts: use gradient text, glassmorphism, or decorative blur
use the hero-metric template (big number, small label, supporting stats, gradient accent). Money is shown as fact, not theater.
use side-stripe borders (border-left/right greater than 1px as colored accent)
invent card grids of identical icon + heading + text patterns
use display fonts (Plus Jakarta Sans) for body copy, labels, or buttons
hard-delete financial data — soft delete only with deletedAt timestamp
show 'No internet' errors for Firestore reads; serve from cache silently
use Paytm/PhonePe energy — no busy promo gradients, banner spam, or neon
use Tally density — no jargon-heavy gray enterprise tables
use cartoon mascots, oversized rounded cards, or confetti
